goal: Prove Ralph Foundry can advance from bounded run contracts to a Team-Gated Autonomous goal loop with evidence and learning write-back.
sourceRef: Story 1.2 — TraceMiddleware Integration / Ralph Foundry MVP continuation
successCriteria: Goal manifest schema is valid JSON and documented in the Data Dictionary
Goal result schema is valid JSON and documented in the Data Dictionary
Auto-loop harness explains Team RAM gates and hard stop conditions
Validation commands are explicit and runnable
validationCommands: git diff --name-only | python3 -c "import sys; blocked=('.env','.env.local','src/','docker/','docker-compose.yml'); bad=[p.strip() for p in sys.stdin if p.strip().startswith(blocked)]; sys.exit(1 if bad else 0)"
breakingChangePolicy: Only patch-level bumps are non-breaking; minor bumps require a migration step.
